summary: Iteration 216: 7-day activity sparkline per domain (v2.5.2 enhancement) verified end-to-end on /intake/learning. Both sparkline SVGs render with correct testids, tooltips, and numeric totals; backend trend_7d shape is correct (length 7, dates ascending, dense/zero-filled) for both sales_intake and ap_posting. Flat sparklines with total '0' observed as expected (no recent events after sparkline-seed cleanup). Regression: Refresh reloads all panels, /ai-learning still loads without error boundary. Pytest 8/8 passing in test_learning_core_events.py including the 3 new get_trend tests.
critical_code_review_comments: Sparkline component in IntakeLearningPage.js is well-scoped: normalizes counts, handles all-zero (flat line at baseline via max=Math.max(1,...)), sets aria-label and data-testid. No mutation risk.
Parent <span> correctly carries title='Last 7d — N events' for native hover tooltip and numeric total is rendered as sibling text — matches spec.

Backend /api/learning/pattern-health/unified attaches trend_7d to each domain adapter with exactly 7 points, ascending by date, each {date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', count: int} — dense and zero-filled as required.
pattern_health_service domain adapters remain read-only; no side effects from adding trend_7d.

success_rate.backend: 100% (trend_7d shape verified via curl; 8/8 pytest in test_learning_core_events.py)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 8 targeted checks passed: page load, unified panel, 2 sparkline testids, 2 title tooltips, 2 totals, refresh reload, /ai-learning regression)

seed_data_creation: None. Read-only verification. Did NOT mutate Giovanni C-10250 or seed any events. Sparklines observed as flat with total=0 for both domains, which is the correct state post-cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sparkline enhancement live on /intake/learning Cross-domain (AP + Intake) section. Testids: sparkline-sales_intake, sparkline-ap_posting. Tooltip on parent span: 'Last 7d — N events'. Numeric total rendered as sibling span. Backend: GET /api/learning/pattern-health/unified returns trend_7d per domain (length 7, ascending, zero-filled). Flat is valid. Pytest covering get_trend: 3 tests (dense series, days-range clamping, domain filter) all passing.

backend_smoke: GET /api/learning/pattern-health/unified — trend_7d length=7, dates ascending, all {date,count:int} for sales_intake and ap_posting
frontend_ui: sparkline-sales_intake: SVG with <polyline>, aria-label='7-day trend, 0 events', parent title='Last 7d — 0 events', total='0' — PASS
sparkline-ap_posting: SVG with <polyline>, aria-label='7-day trend, 0 events', parent title='Last 7d — 0 events', total='0' — PASS
Refresh button reloads — pattern-health-panel, pattern-health-unified, and sparklines all re-render — PASS
Regression /ai-learning loads without error boundary — PASS
